mapper.select: SELECT * FROM callback_task WHERE task_status = 0 AND scheduled_time <= NOW() AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority ASC, scheduled_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE callback_task SET task_status = #{status}, task_status_name = #{statusName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE callback_task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS calling, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS transfer_human, SUM(CASE WHEN task_status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired FROM callback_task WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0

SELECT DATE(t.create_time) AS stat_date, r.satisfaction_level AS satisfaction_level, r.satisfaction_level_name AS satisfaction_level_name, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM callback_task t INNER JOIN callback_result r ON t.callback_task_id = r.callback_task_id WHERE t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND t.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(t.create_time), r.satisfaction_level, r.satisfaction_level_name ORDER BY stat_date DESC, satisfaction_level ASC

SELECT AVG(r.timeliness_score) AS avg_timeliness, AVG(r.attitude_score) AS avg_attitude, AVG(r.solving_score) AS avg_solving, AVG(r.overall_score) AS avg_overall FROM callback_task t INNER JOIN callback_result r ON t.callback_task_id = r.callback_task_id WHERE t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND t.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT t.alert_dept_code AS dept_code, t.alert_dept_name AS dept_name, COUNT(1) AS total_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.task_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_tasks, AVG(r.overall_score) AS avg_overall, SUM(CASE WHEN r.satisfaction_level <= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS satisfied_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN r.satisfaction_level >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dissatisfied_cnt FROM callback_task t LEFT JOIN callback_result r ON t.callback_task_id = r.callback_task_id WHERE t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND t.deleted = 0 AND (r.deleted = 0 OR r.deleted IS NULL)
AND t.area_code LIKE CONCAT(#{areaCode}, '%')
GROUP BY t.alert_dept_code, t.alert_dept_name ORDER BY avg_overall DESC
SELECT * FROM callback_task WHERE task_status = 1 AND call_start_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY call_start_time ASC

SELECT * FROM callback_task WHERE task_status = 3 AND call_times < max_retry_times AND (next_attempt_time IS NULL OR next_attempt_time <= NOW()) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY next_attempt_time ASC, priority ASC LIMIT #{limit}
